note: seq=36: ACTIVATE LANE MODE. Append ATLAS_LANES="lifeline data feature" to /etc/atlas/autopull.env (idempotent). v4 re-sources autopull.env each cycle, so next cycle it drains per-lane queues (manifests/<lane>/seq-N.json) IN ADDITION to the flat queue -> lifelines/metrics in their own lane can never be blocked by a failed data seq. Guardrail-safe (autopull.env is not a FORBID path; cmd starts with /opt/atlas/).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; p='/etc/atlas/autopull.env'; c=open(p).read() if os.path.exists(p) else ''; open(p,'a').write('\nATLAS_LANES=\"lifeline data feature\"\n') if 'ATLAS_LANES=' not in c else None; print('ATLAS_LANES set' if 'ATLAS_LANES=' not in c else 'ATLAS_LANES already present')"
